SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.cobol

Class AbstractCobolFile

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.cobol.AbstractCobolFile
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.iscobol.rts.DynamicFile, com.iscobol.rts.IOConstants, com.iscobol.rts.RuntimeErrorsNumbers
Direct Known Subclasses:
CobolIndexedFile, CobolLineSequentialFile, CobolRelativeFile, CobolSequentialFile
public abstract class AbstractCobolFile extends Object implements com.iscobol.rts.DynamicFile, com.iscobol.rts.RuntimeErrorsNumbers
